# HizmatAI — Implementation Plan
**Generated by Antigravity** | Project: aihack | Date: 2026-05-17

---

## Project Overview

Build **HizmatAI**, an agentic AI-powered home service booking platform for Pakistan's informal economy. The system connects users with local service providers (electricians, plumbers, AC technicians, cleaners, beauticians, home tutors) through a multilingual conversational interface (Urdu script, Roman Urdu, English) across Karachi, Lahore, and Islamabad.

**Stack:** Google ADK · Gemini 2.0/2.5 Flash · FastAPI (Python 3.12) · React 18/Vite · Flutter 3.x · Firebase Firestore · Stripe

---

## Phase 1 — Backend & Agent Pipeline

### 1.1 FastAPI Server Setup
- Initialize FastAPI app (`main.py`) on port 8000 with CORS for React (5173) + Flutter (8080)
- Primary endpoint: `POST /chat` — routes all requests through Google ADK LlmAgent, falls back to direct pipeline on LLM error
- Granular endpoints: `/intent`, `/rank`, `/price`, `/book`, `/followup` (for Flutter step-by-step flow)
- Supporting endpoints: `/trace`, `/scenario`, `/health`, `/session/{id}` (GET + DELETE)
- Stripe payment endpoints: `/create-payment-intent`, `/payment-status/{id}`

### 1.2 Agent Architecture (6-Agent Pipeline)
All agents implemented as Python functions in `agents.py`, then wrapped as ADK tools in `adk_orchestrator.py`:

| Agent | Function | Responsibility |
|-------|----------|----------------|
| IntentAgent | `run_intent_agent()` | Multilingual NLP → service_type, zone, city, urgency, budget_max |
| DiscoveryAgent | `discover_providers()` | Filter by service + zone; cross-zone fallback (Scenario B) |
| RankAgent | `run_rank_agent()` | 6-factor weighted score: distance 20%, rating 25%, reliability 20%, specialization 15%, price 10%, cancellation 10% |
| PriceAgent | `run_price_agent()` | PKR quote: base + urgency 20% + distance PKR50/km>5km + peak surge 15% + loyalty −5% |
| BookingAgent | `run_booking_agent()` | Slot validation, double-booking guard, HMZ-{hex8} ref generation |
| FollowupAgent | `run_followup_agent()` | cancel_by_provider, dispute, status_update, feedback |

### 1.3 Google ADK Orchestrator
- `LlmAgent` wrapping Gemini 2.0/2.5 Flash (GROQ fallback via LiteLlm)
- System prompt: language mirroring, "Aap" register, full pipeline mandate, edge case handling
- `InMemorySessionService` + `Runner` for multi-turn context
- `ContextVar` for thread-safe per-request state
- Retry logic: 3 attempts on 429/503/RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED

### 1.4 Data Layer
- `providers.json`: 25 mock providers (Karachi ~9, Lahore ~8, Islamabad ~8)
- Provider schema: id, name, service_type, zone, city, lat, lng, rating, hourly_rate, is_available, on_time_score, cancellation_rate, specializations, available_slots
- `refresh_provider_slots()`: regenerates available_slots relative to current time on server startup
- `_bookings_db`: in-memory list (migrated to Firestore in Session 5)
- Firestore seeded via `seed_firestore.py`

### 1.5 Multilingual NLP
- Urdu script: Unicode range check 0x0600–0x06FF
- Roman Urdu: keyword dictionary priority check BEFORE English fallback
  - `bijli/bijlee` → electrician, `pani/paani` → plumber, `AC/thanda` → ac_repair, `safai` → home_cleaning, `ustaad` → home_tutor
- ASCII keywords: `\b` word boundaries (prevents substring false matches)
- Urdu script keywords: plain substring match (no word boundaries in Arabic script)
- Input normalization: emoji stripping, repeated char collapsing (`hhelp` → `help`)
- Budget extraction: regex patterns (`budget 1500`, `max 2000 rs`, `1500 tak`)
- Haversine distance: custom `haversine.py` — no Maps API dependency

---

## Phase 2 — React Frontend

### 2.1 Two-Phase Booking Flow
- Phase 1 (`runPhase1`): IntentAgent + DiscoveryAgent + RankAgent → `ProviderPicker` (top 3)
- Phase 2 (`runPhase2`): PriceAgent + BookingAgent + FollowupAgent → `BookingCard`
- Quick replies: slot alternatives and provider switches surfaced as chips when conflict detected

### 2.2 Core Components
- `ChatWindow` — message bubbles, typing indicator, auto-scroll
- `AgentTrace` — live agent decision panel, 150ms CSS stagger per step
- `ProviderPicker` — top-3 cards: score, rating, distance, why_chosen, Book CTA
- `BookingCard` — HMZ-ref confirmation, 4-step timeline, Cancel + Pay
- `BookingHistory` — past bookings modal, Firestore + localStorage persistence
- `DemoBar` — 4 scenario chips (A/B/C/D) always visible in input bar
- `HeroSuggestions` — 4 language-specific sample prompts on empty state
- `PaymentSheet` — Stripe Elements form with clientSecret
- `AuthModal` — Google OAuth + Guest sign-in
- `Header` — active agent indicator, trace toggle, auth controls
- `Toast/ToastContainer` — 3.5s auto-dismiss notifications

### 2.3 agentEngine.js (Client-Side Pipeline)
Full JavaScript reimplementation of all 6 agents:
- Zero backend calls, zero API key — 100% client-side
- Identical business logic: same keyword dicts, same scoring weights, same pricing formula
- `crypto.randomUUID()` for booking refs
- Conflict detection against sessionStorage
- Primary demo path (50ms vs 2–8s for ADK path)

### 2.4 Session Management
- `session_id`: `crypto.randomUUID()`, persisted in localStorage
- `convContext` state: memory bubble above input showing service_type, zone, is_urgent
- Memory clear: DELETE `/session/{id}` on backend + reset React state
- `useAuth` hook: Firebase Auth state
- `useBookings` hook: Firestore real-time bookings for authenticated users

### 2.5 Design System
- Background: `#0D0D0D`, Accent: `#00BFA5` teal
- Glassmorphism: `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)`, `rgba(255,255,255,0.04)` fill, `rgba(255,255,255,0.08)` border
- Typography: Inter (Google Fonts)
- PKR: ₨ symbol + `toLocaleString()`
- Responsive: mobile-first, bottom nav + swipeable trace sheet on small screens

---

## Phase 3 — Flutter Customer App

### 3.1 Navigation (GoRouter)
`/` → `/onboarding` → `/role-select` → `/login` → `/profile-setup` → `/home` → `/chat` → `/booking` → `/payment` → `/tracker`

All routes except `/login` and `/register` guarded by Firebase Auth redirect.

### 3.2 State Management (Riverpod)
- `authProvider`: Firebase Auth state
- `bookingProvider`: active booking + history
- `chatProvider`: message list + agent trace
- `workerProvider`: worker profile (dual-role users)

### 3.3 Services
- `api_service.dart` — HTTP to FastAPI
- `mock_ai_service.dart` — 26-provider offline fallback
- `booking_service.dart` — Firestore CRUD
- `firebase_service.dart` — `onSnapshot()` real-time listeners
- `user_service.dart` — user profile Firestore management

### 3.4 Design Tokens
- Primary: `#00B894` mint, Accent: `#6C5CE7` purple, Font: Poppins
- Light morphism cards (deliberate contrast to React dark theme)

### 3.5 Build Targets
- Web: `flutter run -d chrome --web-port=8080`
- Android APK: `flutter build apk --release` → `build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk`

---

## Phase 4 — Flutter Worker App

### 4.1 Features
- Firebase Phone Auth (OTP-based onboarding)
- Design accent: `#FF6B35` orange (distinct from customer mint)
- Incoming job overlay: full-screen alert with accept/decline timer
- Job timeline stepper: En Route → Arrived → Completed
- Earnings dashboard: daily/weekly/monthly PKR (Firestore aggregation)
- In-app Urdu chat (worker ↔ customer)
- Ratings per job, running average
- Calendar: upcoming bookings + blocked dates

### 4.2 Real-Time Architecture
- `Stream<QuerySnapshot>` on `bookings` collection, filtered by `provider_id` + `status='pending'`
- New booking document → triggers incoming job overlay via Riverpod state
- Status change → updates job timeline stepper in real time
- No WebSocket server needed

---

## Phase 5 — Firebase, Payments & Integration

### 5.1 Firebase Firestore
- Project ID: `hizmatai`
- Collections: `providers`, `bookings`, `sessions`
- Security rules: `firestore.rules` — owner-only booking writes, worker-only status updates
- Seed: `seed_firestore.py` populates `providers` from `providers.json`

### 5.2 Stripe Payments
- `/create-payment-intent`: amount_pkr × 100 (paisas), returns `clientSecret`
- `/payment-status/{id}`: Stripe PaymentIntent status retrieval
- React `PaymentSheet` renders Stripe Elements
- PKR minimum: PKR 50 (enforced server-side)
- Mode: sandbox (sk_test_...)

### 5.3 Demo Scenarios
| Scenario | Trigger | Demonstrates |
|----------|---------|--------------|
| A | AC repair DHA, pre-injected conflict | Double-booking detection → next slot |
| B | AC tech G-13 Islamabad | Zone miss → cross-zone fallback |
| C | `"koi repair wala chahiye ghar mein"` | Ambiguous input → clarification |
| D | `"Electrician chahiye DHA mein, urgent hai"` | Full 6-agent pipeline end-to-end |

**Demo order:** D → A → C (most impactful first)

### 5.4 Deployment
- Backend: `uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000`
- Frontend: `npm run dev` (port 5173) or `dist/` for static
- Flutter: `flutter run -d chrome --web-port=8080`
- All services: `./start.sh`

---

## Non-Goals (Hackathon Scope)
- Live Stripe PKR keys (sandbox only)
- Real WhatsApp/SMS delivery (simulated)
- Live GPS tracking (haversine distance only)
- Production CORS restrictions (currently `allow_origins=["*"]`)
- Automated test suite
- Cities beyond Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad
- Services beyond 6 categories
